meaning: adj.波罗的海的,波罗的海诸国的,波罗的语的
examples: The Baltic people have a right to determine their own future.
France is on the point of recognizing the independence of the Baltic States.
The Nordic countries have been quick to assert their interest in the development of the Baltic States.
Even nations which have implemented serious reform programs, like the Baltic States, could make further improvements.
Latvia scored lowest of the three Baltic states in the 2012 Index of Economic Freedom.
